title: ReviewReport
description: Output contract for the review skill — quality assessment and auto-heal results for generated test code.

overallScore.description: Aggregate quality score across all review dimensions (0–100)

dimensions.description: Per-dimension breakdown of the quality review

name.description: Name of the review dimension (e.g. 'Selector Quality', 'Assertion Coverage')

file.description: File in which the issue was found

line.description: Line number where the issue occurs

autoHealed.description: Whether the review skill automatically fixed this issue

healAction.description: Description of the automated fix applied, if autoHealed is true

healedCount.description: Total number of issues that were automatically healed

remainingIssues.description: Total number of issues that remain after auto-healing

passesQualityGate.description: Whether the generated tests meet the minimum quality threshold to proceed
